fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Missouri SLP License Requirements — Fees, Board Contact & How to Apply (2026)
seo.description: Complete guide to Missouri speech-language pathologist licensing. Board fees, Praxis requirements, and telepractice rules for 2026.
seo.keywords: Missouri SLP license, speech-language pathologist Missouri, Missouri speech therapy license

board.name: Advisory Commission for Speech-Language Pathologists and Audiologists

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Missouri.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Earn a Master's Degree in SLP
steps.description: Complete a master's degree from a CAA-accredited program.

steps.title: Pass the Praxis Examination
steps.description: Achieve a passing score on Praxis (test code 5331, score 162).

steps.title: Complete Clinical Fellowship
steps.description: Complete 36 weeks of supervised clinical practice (1,260 hours).

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Submit application with $75 fee to the Division of Professional Registration.

telepractice_text: Missouri permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Missouri issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Missouri is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Missouri SLP license cost?
Is Missouri part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Missouri allow telepractice for SLPs?
